case_title: NGA THI KIEN NGUYEN VS. JOSHUA TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,853.77 FILED BY NGUYEN, NGA THI KIEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSHUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-24-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSHUA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-20-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, NGA THI KIEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSHUA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSHUA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, NGA THI KIEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSHUA $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,665.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $729.92, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
